title: M3-03b: Implement client-side queue limit (20 messages max)
acceptance_criteria: Client maintains message queue with max 20 messages
Queue structure: { id, sessionId, content, timestamp }[]
On reconnection, queue is flushed in FIFO order
If queue exceeds max, oldest messages are dropped with warning
Queue persists to localStorage across page refreshes
deliverables: Modified: WebSocketProvider with client-side message queue
